proposal_title: Support Research on Non-Human Entity Legal Frameworks

EFF is a reputable digital rights organization well-positioned to conduct this foundational legal research. Understanding existing legal precedents for non-human entity rights is a logical and necessary first step toward building the case for AI personhood and agent rights.
